anyOf.title: Contact name
anyOf.description: Display name of the contact person or team.

anyOf.title: Contact email
anyOf.description: Email address used to reach the contact.

anyOf.title: Contact phone
anyOf.description: Phone number used to reach the contact, in E.164 format when possible.

SbomContact.title: SBOM contact
SbomContact.description: A contact person or team associated with an SBOM supplier, author, or security entry. All fields are optional, but at least one should be set for the contact to be useful.

name.title: Supplier name
name.description: Supplier display name. Required when a supplier block is provided — this is the NTIA minimum-elements 'Supplier Name' field that compliance checks key on.

anyOf.title: Supplier URL(s)
anyOf.description: One supplier URL or an array of URLs. The scalar-or-array form is normalised by `resolveSBOMMetadata`; both shapes are accepted by Phase 2.

anyOf.title: Supplier contact(s)
anyOf.description: One contact object or an array of contacts. The scalar-or-array form is normalised by `resolveSBOMMetadata`; both shapes are accepted by Phase 2.

SbomSupplier.title: SBOM Supplier
SbomSupplier.description: The NTIA minimum-elements 'Supplier Name' entity for the SBOM. Emitted on the BOM's `metadata.supplier` and used to satisfy the supplier-name NTIA compliance check.

anyOf.title: Copyright holder
anyOf.description: Copyright holder name. Appears in the BOM's `metadata.component.copyright` formatted as 'Copyright (c) <range> <holder>'.

allOf.title: Copyright start year
allOf.description: Year the copyright begins, used to format a year range against the current year. Most users should NOT set this — it is auto-detected from the npm registry's first-publication date. Override only when registry lookup is unreliable or the copyright predates first npm publication.

SbomCopyright.title: SBOM Copyright
SbomCopyright.description: Copyright metadata applied to every released package's BOM. Merged over auto-inferred defaults — explicit config wins.

anyOf.title: Authors
anyOf.description: Author contacts written to the BOM's `metadata.authors`. Used when `package.json` `author`/`contributors` are insufficient or need explicit override.

anyOf.title: Publisher
anyOf.description: Publisher name written to the BOM's `metadata.component.publisher`. Defaults to the supplier name when unset.

anyOf.title: Documentation URL
anyOf.description: Documentation URL written to the BOM as an external reference of type 'documentation'. Typically the project's docs site or repository docs path.

SbomConfig.title: SBOM Configuration
SbomConfig.description: SBOM metadata applied during the validation phase. Merged over auto-inferred values from each package's `package.json` by `resolveSBOMMetadata` — explicit config wins. Field names match the prior `SBOMMetadataConfig` consumers so the schema is wire-compatible with existing configs.

anyOf.title: JSON Schema reference
anyOf.description: Optional URL of the JSON Schema this config conforms to. Editors and json-schema-aware tools use this for completion and validation; the action itself does not require it.

SilkReleaseConfig.title: Silk Release Action input config
SilkReleaseConfig.description: Input configuration for the Silk Release Action. Sourced (in precedence order) from the `sbom-config` action input, the `.github/silk-release.json` file in the repository, and the `SILK_RELEASE_SBOM_TEMPLATE` environment variable. Only the `sbom` section is consumed by Phase 2 today; the top-level shape leaves room for future release-related sections.
